response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong senior-level engineering experience and has worked on complex systems, they lack the core technical requirements for this role. Java and Kotlin expertise are mentioned only in passing (robotic arm work), with no evidence of Spring ecosystem knowledge, enterprise framework experience, or deep JVM understanding. The resume shows a career trajectory in web/full-stack and AI infrastructure rather than enterprise Java tooling, making this a fundamental skills mismatch despite overall engineering capability.
strengths: Proven senior/staff-level experience across multiple companies with complex, large-scale systems
Strong software craftsmanship foundation (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture) and demonstrated ability to mentor others
IDE development experience with C/C++ (LabWindows/CVI) showing familiarity with tooling concepts
concerns: Java expertise is essentially absent from resume—only briefly mentioned in passing for one project, with no depth or focus
No demonstrated experience with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or other enterprise frameworks central to the role
Career progression has been in web/full-stack (JavaScript/TypeScript/Node.js) and AI infrastructure, not JVM or enterprise Java ecosystems

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering capability and system design skills
